case_title: KENNETH MARTIN VS. KATHRYN JANELLE LEE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED MAR-02-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, KATHRYN JANELLE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2015 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,837.08 FILED BY MARTIN, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, KATHRYN JANELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, KENNETH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEE, KATHRYN JANELLE PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
